title: Daily Journal for Children Aged 5-10 | Helps with Big Feelings, Confidence & Emotional Expression | Gratitude, Kindness & Mindfulness Activities | Diary for Boys & Girls
features: SUPPORTS EMOTIONAL EXPRESSION – A gentle journal that helps children explore feelings, process their day and build emotional confidence in a positive, safe space.
GRATITUDE & MINDFULNESS PRACTICE - Simple daily prompts and a gratitude list help your child develop a positive mindset, resilience and appreciation for the little things.
KINDNESS & CONFIDENCE BUILDING - Includes “Acts of Kindness” and “Accomplishment” pages to inspire empathy, pride, and self-belief. Encourages calm reflection and mindful habits.
FUN & ENGAGING FOR AGES 5-10 - With colourful creative spaces, drawing sections, jokes, puzzles and imagination prompts to keep journaling exciting and screen-free.
BEAUTIFUL KEEPSAKE GIFT – Soft PU leather cover in Yellow, Pink, Rose Gold or Blue. Makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, wellbeing support, Christmas or back-to-school confidence.
description: Product Description My Magical Kids Journal will make a wonderful gift to both young and older kids. Great as a birthday gift or Christmas present. FUN RAINBOW DESIGN, ABOUT ME PAGES, READING JOURNAL & MORE: Each page in the Magical Journal is filled with rainbow colours. So much fun in one little book. Drawings pages to encourage them to be creative. Word searches, jokes, positive quotes and more. Use the reading journal pages to make reading more fun. Colourful rainbow pages in a simple layout to give your child the opportunity to express their feelings, practice their writing skills and reflect on their day. Bucket list and accomplishments page Daily journal and reflection pages Fun rainbow design About Me pages Reading Journal and More! ACTIVITY STICKERS It includes 4 pages of fun colourful activity stickers that fit perfectly into the back pocket of the book. HIGH-QUALITY PU LEATHER The journal is made of high-quality PU leather and comes in four magical colours that your little one will love. A SAFE SPACE FOR KIDS Our kid's daily journal is a bit like a diary but it also includes daily journaling pages to help children express their thoughts & feelings. It includes some daily prompts and a gratitude list section to get them started and help keep them engaged. SET THEIR PATH EARLY ON We've included fun and colourful thinking bubbles where kids can write down what they want to be when they grow up. TEACH THEM TO FOCUS ON THE GOOD RATHER THAN THE BAD Acts of kindness pages dedicated to teaching your child true acts of kindness by carrying out selfless acts that will leave them feeling uplifted and put a smile on the face of others. The About me and ‘Things I am good at and do well’ pages will help your child discover themselves and help them focus on their strengths. MORE THAN A DIARY FOR KIDS The boys & girls journal is made of high-quality PU leather and comes in four colours—yellow, pink, rose gold and blue. It has crosswords, jokes, quotes, About Me, Accomplishment pages, and more.
